notification.bash: INPUT=$(cat); if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then MSG=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message // "Agent needs input"' 2>/dev/null); MSG=${MSG:-Agent needs input}; else MSG='Agent needs input'; fi; MSG=$(printf '%s' "$MSG" | tr -d '\000-\037\177' | cut -c1-200); printf '\e]777;notify;Copilot CLI;%s\a' "$MSG" > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null || true

preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then NAME=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName // "tool"'); MSG=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r 'if (.toolArgs | type) == "string" then (try (.toolArgs | fromjson) catch {}) else .toolArgs end | (.question // .summary // .prompt // "Agent is asking")' 2>/dev/null); MSG=${MSG:-Agent is asking}; else NAME='ask_user'; MSG='Agent is asking'; fi; NAME=$(printf '%s' "$NAME" | tr -d '\000-\037\177' | cut -c1-50); MSG=$(printf '%s' "$MSG" | tr -d '\000-\037\177' | cut -c1-200); printf '\e]777;notify;Copilot CLI (%s);%s\a' "$NAME" "$MSG" > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null; exit 0
